feature_descriptions.rolling_avg_position_5: Average finish position over last 5 races
feature_descriptions.rolling_avg_points_5: Average points scored over last 5 races
feature_descriptions.quali_gap_to_pole: Qualifying time gap to pole position (seconds)
feature_descriptions.quali_gap_pct: Qualifying gap as percentage of pole time
feature_descriptions.circuit_avg_position: Driver historical avg position at this circuit
feature_descriptions.circuit_races_count: Number of previous races at this circuit
feature_descriptions.season_cumulative_points: Cumulative points in the current season so far
feature_descriptions.rolling_consistency: Std dev of grid-to-finish delta (lower = more consistent)
feature_descriptions.pit_stops_vs_field: Number of pit stops relative to field average
